title: C++ Standard Template Library (STL)
content:
### Standard Template Library (STL)

The STL is a powerful set of C++ template classes and functions that provide common data structures and algorithms.

---

### STL Components

| Component | Description | Examples |
|-----------|-------------|----------|
| Containers | Data structures | `vector`, `list`, `map`, `set` |
| Algorithms | Operations on data | `sort`, `find`, `binary_search` |
| Iterators | Traverse containers | `begin()`, `end()`, `advance()` |
| Functors | Function objects | `greater<int>()`, `less<int>()` |
| Adaptors | Interface adapters | `stack`, `queue`, `priority_queue` |
| Allocators | Memory management | `allocator<T>` |

---

### Container Categories

| Category | Containers | Description |
|----------|------------|-------------|
| Sequence | `vector`, `deque`, `list`, `forward_list`, `array` | Ordered elements |
| Associative | `set`, `multiset`, `map`, `multimap` | Sorted by key |
| Unordered | `unordered_set`, `unordered_map`, `unordered_multiset`, `unordered_multimap` | Hash-based |

---

### Common STL Containers

| Container | Header | Characteristics |
|-----------|--------|-----------------|
| `std::vector` | `<vector>` | Dynamic array, O(1) random access |
| `std::list` | `<list>` | Doubly linked list, O(1) insert/delete |
| `std::deque` | `<deque>` | Double-ended queue |
| `std::map` | `<map>` | Sorted key-value pairs |
| `std::set` | `<set>` | Sorted unique elements |
| `std::unordered_map` | `<unordered_map>` | Hash table (C++11) |

---

> **Key Point:** The STL is a cornerstone of modern C++. Understanding containers, iterators, and algorithms will make you significantly more productive as a C++ programmer.
